rationale: The citing paper uses Corstjens and Lal (2000) for a specific conceptual role, not just a background list. In the literature review, it explicitly cites that study to motivate the claim that private-label availability can affect store loyalty, and then operationalizes this in its model via the proportion of unique SKUs as a private-label proxy. This citation therefore informs the model specification and hypothesis framing around assortment dimensions relevant to store choice.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Corstjens and Lal's private-label loyalty idea in a broader store-choice model by including a private-label proxy as one assortment component. It uses the cited work as conceptual support for why private-label related assortment structure may influence patronage.
